# Coinly

> The social network for crypto traders. Share verified trades, follow other traders, and chat in real time.

## About

Coinly is a social web app for crypto traders. Users connect their exchange accounts (e.g., Binance) so their trades and positions can be shared as verified posts. Followers see a feed of trade and position posts with P&L, can like and comment, and can direct-message one another.

## Features

- Social feed of trade and position posts from followed traders
- Connect crypto exchanges to share trades and positions automatically (verification)
- Public profiles with portfolio net worth history
- Trade and position embeds with P&L (profit/loss) display
- Follow other traders
- Real-time direct messages
- Verified-badge system for API-synced trades

## Access

Coinly requires user authentication to post, like, comment, or message.
The public feed is browsable without an account. Sign up at `/signup`.
The application is free to use.

## Technology

Built with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Supabase, and Tailwind CSS.
Exchange integrations via public broker APIs. Charts via lightweight-charts.
